case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. VS. DARREN N. SHAPIRO et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION CCP 395 (B) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-10-2010 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 AGAINST KURTISS A. JACOBS, ESQ. FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: MAR-10-2010, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAR-25-2010. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-10-2010 CONTINUED TO MAY-12-2010 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. SERVED JAN-31-2009, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SHAPIRO, DARREN N.

MINI-MINUTES FOR MAR-10-2010 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212
MINI-MINUTES FOR MAY-12-2010 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212
THERE WAS NO APPEARANCE, NOR OBJECTION FILED. CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING MAY-12-2010 AT 1:30PM. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-12-2010 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: There was no appearance, nor objection filed. Therefore, the court ordered the case dismissed. Proceedings not reported. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-10-2010 Continued To May-12-10 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
